reasoning: Both result sets contain enough accurate information to answer the query’s core fact: Scottie Scheffler was announced as the Jack Nicklaus Award/PGA TOUR Player of the Year for 2025, giving him a fourth consecutive win, and this was announced by the PGA TOUR in December 2025.
